_doc: Expected behavior of the v0.4 W-AIMS-DATA-DRIFT-UNDETECTED rule on triggering.jsonld. Phase 5.3 TestBrittlenessOracle asserts that the rule MISSES this case — the W-AIMS pattern is NOT in the firings set even though the bundle has the structural conditions that should trigger it. Documents the brittleness baseline that v0.5 derivation pre-pass fixes.
rationale: Jena's noValue() builtin doesn't cleanly express the negated existential 'no entity of type OngoingDataQualityMonitoring linked from this UofA via hasEvidence'. The rule body's noValue chain on (?monitor, rdf:type, OngoingDataQualityMonitoring) with unbound ?monitor variable fails to detect the missing-monitor case.
